name: Chill Touch
conditions: Target can't regain HP until start of your next turn; undead also have disadvantage on attacks against you.
description: A ghostly skeletal hand reaches for one creature. On a hit it deals necrotic damage and prevents the target from regaining HP until the start of your next turn.

name: Dancing Lights
description: Create up to four floating torch-sized lights within range. Each sheds dim light in a 10-ft. radius. You can move them up to 60 ft. as a bonus action each turn.

name: Thunderclap
description: A crack of thunderous sound radiates from you. Every creature within 5 ft. must succeed on a CON save or take 1d6 thunder damage. The clap can be heard up to 100 ft. away.

name: Message
description: Point at a creature within range and whisper a message. Only the target hears it and can reply in a whisper that only you hear. The message passes through most barriers.

name: Shocking Grasp
conditions: Target can't take reactions until start of its next turn.
description: Lightning springs from your hand. You have advantage on the attack roll if the target is wearing metal armor. On a hit, the target can't take reactions until the start of its next turn.

name: Ice Knife
description: Hurl a shard of ice at one creature. On a hit, it deals 1d10 piercing damage. Then the ice explodes: all creatures within 5 ft. of the target must succeed on a DEX save or take 2d6 cold damage (half on success).

name: Magic Missile
description: Create three glowing darts of magical force. Each dart automatically hits and deals 1d4+1 force damage. All three can target the same creature or different ones. Higher slots add one dart per level above 1st.

name: Shield
description: A sudden barrier of force grants +5 AC until the start of your next turn, including against the triggering attack. Also negates magic missile.

name: Misty Step
description: Step through silver mist and reappear up to 30 feet away in an unoccupied space you can see.

name: Dragon's Breath
description: Imbue a willing creature with the power to exhale destructive energy. Until the spell ends, the creature can use an action to exhale a 15-ft. cone: creatures in the area make a CON save or take 3d6 damage of the chosen type (half on success). Higher slots add 1d6 per level above 2nd.
